headers.title: Search
headers.description: Please enter a title or key words to search anything into the database. You have to provide at least 3 characters and at maximum 32.

validation.invalidValue: You have to provide at least 3 characters and at maximum 32.

body.fetchingData: Fetching data from the database... Please wait few seconds.

success.title: Results

success.description_plural: {{count}} results were found for your search. It's up to you to choose what interests you!

body.notFound: No result was found for your search. Please try again being more precise.
